paper.title: Gamma Backgrounds for Experiments at the High Flux Isotope Reactor

statuses.reproducible: Regenerated from the public spectrum bundle by the listed command.
statuses.published-ancillary: The plotted numerical result is public in the official arXiv ancillary bundle; rebuilding the upstream calculation needs additional inputs.
statuses.not-yet-ported: The public spectrum bundle contains the required measurements, but the legacy analysis has not yet been converted into the supported workflow.
statuses.source-artifact: A diagram, drawing, or photograph distributed with the paper source rather than a data-analysis output.
statuses.external-input-required: Exact regeneration requires data or simulations that are not in the public HFIR spectrum bundle.

figures.label: hall_diagram
figures.title: HFIR Experiment Hall diagram
figures.notes: Facility schematic supplied as a publication asset; it is not derived from the spectrum database.

figures.label: shield_cart
figures.title: Shield-cart drawing and photograph
figures.notes: Original illustration and photograph.

figures.label: key_measurement_locations
figures.title: Key measurement locations and orientations
figures.notes: Annotated publication schematic. The public browser provides a data-driven location view separately.

figures.label: reactor_spectrum
figures.title: MIF reactor-on versus reactor-off spectrum
figures.notes: Measurements are public; the exact paper selection and styling remain in legacy analysis code.

figures.label: rate_ratios
figures.title: Cycle 491 reactor power ratios
figures.notes: Candidate legacy entry point: scripts/power_compare.py.

figures.label: rate_time_series
figures.title: MIF count rate over time
figures.notes: Candidate legacy entry point: scripts/plot_time_series.py.

figures.label: down_scan
figures.title: Down-facing position scan
figures.notes: Candidate legacy entry points: scripts/positions_scan_plot.py and scripts/plot_all_position_scans.py.

figures.label: east_scan
figures.title: PROSPECT east-face position scan
figures.notes: Candidate legacy entry points: scripts/positions_scan_plot.py and scripts/plot_all_position_scans.py.

figures.label: HB4_shield
figures.title: MIF, HB4, and Shield Center spectra
figures.notes: The measurements are included in the public database and in the unfolding ancillary set.

figures.label: russian_doll
figures.title: Russian Doll shielding cutout
figures.notes: Original engineering illustration.

figures.label: rd_water
figures.title: Russian Doll water-brick shielding
figures.notes: Original photograph.

figures.label: water_brick_configs
figures.title: Water and floor-lead shield configurations
figures.notes: Publication schematic of the four configurations compared in Figure 14.

figures.label: RD_on_off_compare
figures.title: Russian Doll full-energy reactor-on/off spectrum
figures.notes: Candidate legacy entry point: scripts/rd_plot.py.

figures.label: rd_shield_comparison
figures.title: Russian Doll low-energy shield comparison
figures.notes: Rebuilt from the public raw spectra. The official paper artifact is also copied for visual comparison.

figures.label: sigma_fit
figures.title: Detector energy-resolution fit
figures.notes: Candidate legacy entry point: scripts/peak_sigma_fitter.py.

figures.label: measurement_locations
figures.title: Unfolding measurement locations
figures.notes: A PNG and its numerical location metadata are included in the official ancillary bundle.

figures.label: unfold_comparison_example
figures.title: Measured versus unfolded spectra
inputs: Official arXiv ancillary measured and unfolded CSVs
figures.notes: Both response-model versions and all plotted numerical values are published as ancillary files.

figures.label: all_unfolded_spectra
figures.title: All isotropic-response unfolded spectra
figures.notes: The authoritative unfolded values are public; recalculating them requires response matrices and P2x.

figures.label: unfolded_spectrum_bounds
figures.title: Unfolding response-model bounds
figures.notes: The supported command regenerates the requested MIF Rx On/Off and Shield Center subset; the paper artifact contains all six locations.

figures.label: prospect_IBD_efficiency
figures.title: PROSPECT prompt-like singles rates
inputs: PROSPECT detector data not included in this repository
figures.notes: The published image is available in the paper source, but the underlying segment data is external.

figures.label: prospect_boundary_gamma
figures.title: PROSPECT-boundary HPGe spectra
figures.notes: The three HPGe measurements are in the public spectrum and ancillary bundles.

figures.label: prospect_nw_sim
figures.title: PROSPECT data versus gamma simulation
figures.notes: Neither the PROSPECT event data nor detector simulation output is part of the HFIR public spectrum bundle.

figures.label: labelled_spectra_1
figures.title: Labeled MIF spectrum, 700-1900 keV
figures.notes: The spectrum is public; paper-exact peak labels have not been exposed as a supported command.

figures.label: labelled_spectra_2
figures.title: Labeled MIF spectrum, 6700-7900 keV
figures.notes: The spectrum is public; paper-exact peak labels have not been exposed as a supported command.

figures.label: labelled_spectra_3
figures.title: Labeled MIF spectrum, 7900-9100 keV
figures.notes: The spectrum is public; paper-exact peak labels have not been exposed as a supported command.

figures.label: labelled_spectra_4
figures.title: Labeled MIF spectrum, 9100-10300 keV
figures.notes: The spectrum is public; paper-exact peak labels have not been exposed as a supported command.

figures.label: labelled_spectra_5
figures.title: Labeled MIF spectrum, 10300-11500 keV
figures.notes: The spectrum is public; paper-exact peak labels have not been exposed as a supported command.

figures.label: collimator_effectiveness
figures.title: Collimator response-model effectiveness
inputs: Geant4 response simulations not included in the public spectrum bundle
figures.notes: Summary efficiency values are published in the ancillary bundle, but exact upstream simulation regeneration needs the response files.
